justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* imports to jakarta.* across all Java files and XML configurations, updates the compiler to release 21, and modernizes JUnit 4 to JUnit 5. However, it retains Hibernate 4.3.1.Final (incompatible with Jakarta EE 9+ and Java 21) and Jersey 3.1.11 without updating Weld or other CDI dependencies, which will likely cause runtime failures. The @Serial annotations are correctly applied to serialVersionUID fields.
